nasb.text: and as I raised my voice and screamed, he left his garment beside me and fled outside.”

esv.text: But as soon as I lifted up my voice and cried, he left his garment beside me and fled out of the house.”

cnv.text: 我高聲呼叫，他就把衣服留在我身邊，跑到外面去了。”

ccb.text: 我大声喊叫，他就把衣服丢在我这里，逃了出去。”

csbs.text: 当我放声呼喊时，他就把自己的衣服撇弃在我身边，逃到外面去了。”
